evals.prompt: We're building a digital twin of our manufacturing floor. It has 12 CNC machines, 3 robotic arms, and 2 conveyor systems. Generate the twin specification including sensor requirements and simulation parameters.
evals.expected_output: Digital twin specification document with detailed sensor mapping (types, frequencies, locations), simulation parameters, and operational models for the manufacturing components
expectations: Response contains simulation parameters or model specification

evals.prompt: Design a predictive maintenance model for our wind turbine fleet using digital twin methodology. Define what sensor data we need, failure prediction intervals, and simulation scenarios.
evals.expected_output: Predictive maintenance framework including required sensor data specifications, failure prediction methodology, simulation scenarios, and maintenance scheduling recommendations
expectations: Response references simulation or modeling approach
